data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic notifications to qualified substitutes when a cancellation occurs. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of such notifications being sent or any related functionality. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature but does not provide concrete evidence of its implementation or operation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
